document_id: important notice   motor vehicles various issues   final

findings.evidence: Inline terms that are bolded for emphasis in the PDF (e.g., '“sales price,”' in the last paragraph on Page 1) are rendered as standard, unbolded text in the HTML. This minor loss of text formatting occurs throughout the document.

The final disclaimer paragraph at the bottom of the page ('To the extent that there is any change...') is completely italicized in the PDF. The HTML renders this paragraph using standard, non-italicized text.
